name: まどろみトラベル
short_description: If you fall asleep, the game ends immediately. Slumber Travel" is a death-memory type simulation. Enjoy a mysterious trip through various troubles in the city of sleep, which governs sleep.
detailed_description:
Let's travel and not be defeated by sleepiness!

Slumber Travel" is a roguelike simulation about a girl named "Konomi" who is not much of a traveler and travels to a "sleep town" that appears at low tide.
The sleeping town is full of "slumber" that prevents her from traveling. Your role is to try to prevent Konomi from falling asleep during the journey.



  • Planning: Decide where to go to see the sights.
    Depending on where you visit, you may be able to befriend residents and receive items?


  • Travel: Falling asleep on the road is outrageous!
    Sleeping streets can make you sleepy just walking around. The game is over as soon as your slumber gauge fills up.


  • Event: An emotional experience is effective against drowsiness!
    If you take the right steps, slumber will diminish. Maybe……
*If you are really sleepy, you can take an energy drink.



  • Estimated play time is 1~2 hours.
  • Three types of endings
  • Hand-drawn animation
  • Sightseeing, lunch, play, shopping, souvenirs!
  • Don't miss a nap!

During your trip, the residents may remind you about how good it feels to sleep.
Enjoy!
